'''fanowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xun|xun]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xun|xun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fanowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæneweth|fæneweth]] || [[word:fænewej|fænewej]] || [[word:fænewesh|fænewesh]] || [[word:fænewe|fænewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanonowoth|fanonowoth]] || [[word:fanonowoj|fanonowoj]] || [[word:fanonowosh|fanonowosh]] || [[word:fanonowo|fanonowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanowoth|fanowoth]] || [[word:fanowoj|fanowoj]] || [[word:fanowosh|fanowosh]] || [[word:fanowo|fanowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanofwoth|fanofwoth]] || [[word:fanofwoj|fanofwoj]] || [[word:fanofwosh|fanofwosh]] || [[word:fanofwof|fanofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fanowotho|fanowotho]] || [[word:fanowojo|fanowojo]] || [[word:fanowosho|fanowosho]] || [[word:fanowoko|fanowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fanowoth|fanowoth]] || [[word:fanowoj|fanowoj]] || [[word:fanowosh|fanowosh]] || [[word:fanowo|fanowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fanowothol|fanowothol]] || [[word:fanowojol|fanowojol]] || [[word:fanowoshol|fanowoshol]] || [[word:fanowokol|fanowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fanowothotho|fanowothotho]] || [[word:fanowojojo|fanowojojo]] || [[word:fanowoshosho|fanowoshosho]] || [[word:fanowoko|fanowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fanowothon|fanowothon]] || [[word:fanowojon|fanowojon]] || [[word:fanowoshon|fanowoshon]] || [[word:fanowokon|fanowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fanowothoro|fanowothoro]] || [[word:fanowojoro|fanowojoro]] || [[word:fanowoshoro|fanowoshoro]] || [[word:fanowokoro|fanowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
